---
title: "Learning"
author: "Milaotou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: hide
    css: styles.css
---
# <span style="display: none;">设置代码块全局选项</span>{.unnumbered}
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	fig.align = "center",
	fig.height = 8,
	fig.width = 10,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	tidy = TRUE
)
library(rstudioapi)
setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
getwd()
```

# 加载包
```{r libraries}

```




```{r}

```

# Session info {.unnumbered}
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```


```{r}
# 设置工作路径
library(rstudioapi);setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$'path'));getwd()
# 加载必要的包
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

# 读取数据
df <- read_excel("示例数据.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet1")

# 清理列名（如果第一行是列名）
colnames(df) <- c("classification", "GC1", "GC2", "GC3")

# 转换成长格式，便于绘图
df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("GC"), 
               names_to = "GC_type", 
               values_to = "value") %>%
  drop_na(value)

# 计算每个分类中三种GC类型的比例（用于饼图）
pie_data <- df_long %>%
  count(classification, GC_type) %>%
  group_by(classification) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

# 定义颜色（与散点图一致）
gc_colors <- c("GC1" = "#F8766D", "GC2" ="#293890", "GC3" =  "#F1b656") 
class_colors <- c("#ABC6E4", "#C39398", "#FCDADA", "#A7D2BA")
# 绘制箱线图 + 散点图
p_box <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = classification, y = value, fill = GC_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = GC_type), 
              position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.2), 
              size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = gc_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = gc_colors) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Value", fill = "GC Type", color = "GC Type") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

# 绘制饼图函数（每个分类一个）
plot_pie <- function(class_name) {
  data_sub <- pie_data %>% filter(classification == class_name)
  ggplot(data_sub, aes(x = "", y = prop, fill = GC_type)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1) +
    coord_polar("y", start = 0) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = gc_colors) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
   # + labs(title = class_name) #这里和箱图x轴重复，注释掉了
}

# 获取所有分类名称
classes <- unique(pie_data$classification)

# 绘制所有饼图并排列
p_pies <- wrap_plots(lapply(classes, plot_pie), nrow = 1) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# 组合上下两部分
final_plot <- p_box / p_pies +
  plot_layout(heights = c(2, 1))

# 显示图形
print(final_plot)

# 可选：保存图形
# ggsave("组合图.png", final_plot, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```

# Session info
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
